titles.en: Chapter 16 – Wearing the clothing of the Kabah
Chapter 16 – Wearing the clothing of the Kabah

segments: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) عَمَّا يَصِلُ إِلَيْنَا مِنْ ثِيَابِ الْكَعْبَةِ هَلْ يَصْلُحُ لَنَا أَنْ نَلْبَسَ شَيْئاً مِنْهَا قَالَ يَصْلُحُ لِلصِّبْيَانِ وَ الْمَصَاحِفِ وَ الْمِخَدَّةِ تَبْتَغِي بِذَلِكَ الْبَرَكَةَ إِنْ شَاءَ اللَّهُ .
arabic.text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) عَمَّا يَصِلُ إِلَيْنَا مِنْ ثِيَابِ الْكَعْبَةِ هَلْ يَصْلُحُ لَنَا أَنْ نَلْبَسَ شَيْئاً مِنْهَا قَالَ يَصْلُحُ لِلصِّبْيَانِ وَ الْمَصَاحِفِ وَ الْمِخَدَّةِ تَبْتَغِي بِذَلِكَ الْبَرَكَةَ إِنْ شَاءَ اللَّهُ .

segments: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Khalid, from Muhammad Bin Ali, from Abdullah Bin Jabala, from Abdul Malik Bin Utba who said,

‘I asked Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> about that which is brought from the cloth of the Kabah, is it correct for us that we wear something from it?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘It is correct for the children, and the Parchments (covering the Holy Quran), and the pillowcase, seeking the Blessings by that, Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Willing’.
en.hubeali.text:
A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Khalid, from Muhammad Bin Ali, from Abdullah Bin Jabala, from Abdul Malik Bin Utba who said,

‘I asked Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> about that which is brought from the cloth of the Kabah, is it correct for us that we wear something from it?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘It is correct for the children, and the Parchments (covering the Holy Quran), and the pillowcase, seeking the Blessings by that, Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Willing’.

segments: 1. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn Khalid from Muhammad ibn Ali from ‘ Abd Allah ibn Jabalah from ‘Abd al-Malik ibn ‘Utbah who has said the following: “I once asked abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about the pieces of the cloth of al-Ka‘bah that we receive: if we can wear them. He (the Imam) said, ‘They are good for children, Holy books, or pillow cases whereby you seek blessings by the will of Allah.’”
en.sarwar.text: 1. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn Khalid from Muhammad ibn Ali from ‘ Abd Allah ibn Jabalah from ‘Abd al-Malik ibn ‘Utbah who has said the following: “I once asked abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about the pieces of the cloth of al-Ka‘bah that we receive: if we can wear them. He (the Imam) said, ‘They are good for children, Holy books, or pillow cases whereby you seek blessings by the will of Allah.’”

gradings.label: ضعيف
gradings.text: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (7/78)

narratorChain.raw: عِدَّةٌ مِنْ أَصْحَابِنَا عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ خَالِدٍ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ جَبَلَةَ عَنْ عَبْدِ الْمَلِكِ بْنِ عُتْبَةَ قَالَ
